title: pleopeltis ballivianii
intro: Pleopeltis ballivianii, also known as the Bolivian polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pleopeltis ballivianii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves that can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
